visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a night shot of a dark sky filled with stars and a distinct green streak of the aurora borealis stretching vertically. A silhouette of a person's head and shoulders is visible at the bottom center. Yellow subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame against the dark landscape. (2) The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man in his late 20s or early 30s. He is wearing a tan quilted vest, a white long-sleeve shirt, and a green beanie. He gestures with his hands towards the night sky, smiling broadly and talking directly to the camera. A woman in a blue denim jacket is partially visible beside him. (3) A series of shots follows, capturing the aurora borealis in different shapes and intensities. Some shots show vibrant green curtains of light against a starry backdrop, while others include hints of red and purple. The camera is sometimes handheld, showing the movement of the light. (4) The man appears again in a medium shot, standing in a dark field. He continues his narration with high energy, occasionally clasping his hands together or pointing upwards. Behind him, distant lights of a small settlement or buildings are visible. (5) The latter half of the video is a montage of still photos and short video clips. These show the couple posing together under the auroras, holding hands, and looking up in awe. A geometric white dome tent is visible in one shot, suggesting a glamping experience. (6) The final sequence features high-quality footage of intense aurora activity. The sky is filled with sweeping waves of green, magenta, and purple light. The footage is framed with a black border, focusing on the celestial display.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 真的成功追到極光!!! (2) [Subtitle]: 上面有沒有綠綠的. 有啊. 不是我頭上啊. 上面我們現在錄影是真的有. (3) [Subtitle]: 來啦. 就說了嘛. 剛才是慶功宴嘛. 有沒有看到. (4) [Subtitle]: 今天我們有查了一下. 雖然等級是大概二、三這樣而已. 但是因為今天天天氣晴朗. 天公仔囝. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且這個張韶涵沒有騙人. 她的歌是真的. 紅橙黃綠藍. 五彩的歐若拉. (6) [Subtitle]: 對因為平常看都是綠色的. 沒有其實它很多顏色. 對真的是欸. 就在這邊呢. 真的很美. 它就整個從這個山上面炸出來. 滿天星星畫了一個弧在這邊. 哇. (7) [Subtitle]: 最後欣賞一下我們的極光美照. 奇蹟美照. 哇這次來挪威值得了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator and 1 female companion appear throughout the travel vlog.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male wears a tan vest, white sweater, and green beanie. Female wears a light blue denim jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Night sky with aurora borealis and stars, an open field with small structures and a geometric dome tent.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with atmospheric night sounds, including a very light breeze. A male voice, speaking Mandarin with high arousal and a clear, excited tone, asks the audience if they can see the green lights in the sky above his head. (2) As the scene changes, a bright, upbeat acoustic guitar melody enters. The male speaker's voice becomes more centered and crisp, indicating a closer microphone distance. He laughs and shouts 'Lai la!' (Here it comes!), sounding jubilant. A female voice is heard cheering in the background. (3) The acoustic music continues at a steady, moderate tempo. The male narrator explains technical details about the aurora's visibility level and the clear weather conditions. His speech is rapid but well-articulated, conveying genuine enthusiasm. (4) The narration stops, and the audio transitions into a melodic piece featuring soft piano notes and swelling string textures. This music creates a sense of wonder and tranquility, matching the visual montage of the aurora borealis until the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Narrative Experience -> Visual Montage
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: Sharing the successful experience of hunting and seeing the aurora borealis in Norway, capturing the excitement of the moment and the beauty of the phenomenon.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality personal travel vlog documenting a successful aurora borealis sighting in Norway with enthusiastic narration and a cinematic montage.
